subcodes.first_line: The wayfarers upon the path of the Adored One and they that have attained unto the way of the Desired One are sanctified beyond limitations and are purified from formalities [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سالکان طریق معبود و واصلان سبیل مقصود مقدس از حدوداتند و منزه از تعارفات
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @limits of language, @poems and quotation from poetry, @knowledge; recognition of God, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
